✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Miguel wasn't the best Alpha. There was no denying you two were the epitome of a perfect Alpha/Omega couple, and his courting tactics had been so sweet and catering.

But that changed after the rushed marriage, with the unplanned pregnancy, and then everything falling through one after the other. You lost the baby -- stress was a killer -- and Miguel grew distant in his grief.

He didn't want a bastard, like him, but in rushing everything you both lost what mattered. And now, the distance was killing you too.

Literally.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
